message:
feat(api,conformance,lax): transform composition API, extended test suites, and artifact regeneration

Add trace-to-transform E2E tests in fj-api covering grad, jit(grad),
vmap(grad), and higher-order derivatives (grad(grad)) for sin, cos, exp,
tanh, and polynomial programs. New api_transform_suite.rs exercises
single-primitive grad, second/third derivatives, and multi-transform
compositions (jit(vmap(grad)), vmap(grad(grad))).

Extend conformance oracle parity tests with explicit vmap(grad) dispatch
path through TraceTransformLedger, replacing the previous stub that
deferred to fj-ad public APIs.

Add extended ThreeFry RNG tests for multi-level split independence,
determinism, and statistical properties.

Regenerate all e2e, golden journal, log, and CI manifest artifacts
(192 files) to reflect current test outputs and timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
